notes: Pose roughly matches the photo with mantle on left and two long tentacular arms extending up and down on the right, but the silhouette is jittery and broken and the interior reads as photo-trace noise rather than scientific stipple.
specific_issues: broken, jagged outline rather than clean continuous FAO silhouette
jittery double-line edges throughout the mantle and fins
no recognisable almond eye with filled pupil at the photo's eye location
no ring suckers along the arms or tentacular clubs
stipple is scattered noise, not concentrated in the photo's chromatophore field
arms on the right are mushy and indistinct, hard to count individual arms
tentacular club tips lack the distinctive sucker rows visible in the photo
overall reads as edge-detection trace artifact, not single-weight ink plate
